economic_notes: OIB operates extensive business enterprises including campground/RV park, golf course, vineyards, convenience store, forestry, utilities, ready-mix concrete, desert heritage centre, and development corporations. Equity in earnings from business enterprises was $6,905,864 in 2023. ISC funding represents 24% of revenues (down from 27% in 2022).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - business enterprise investments (GBEs and GBPs) were subject to review engagement only, not full audit, so auditors could not obtain sufficient evidence on equity in earnings from business enterprises for 2023 and 2022. OIB has 3 consolidated entities (Inkameep Preschool/Day Care Society, OIB Housing Program, Sen*Pok*Chin Education Society) and 15 GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. No budget presented as staffing shortages prevented adequate budget preparation. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + BC + Federal + FNHA + OTA + CMHC + ONA = $14,164,341. Education expenses include both Sen*Pok*Chin Education ($2,540,317) and Education ($1,293,338) segments totaling $3,833,655. Wages from Schedule 1 = $5,377,327. Annual debt service is principal repayment only per cash flow statement.
